min_support_rule: Rare near-duplicate themes not promoted; core v0 themes retained

themes.name: Same-basket loyalty
themes.inclusion: Mentions always buying the same items/categories
themes.exclusion: One-off purchase complaints unrelated to repetition

themes.name: Autopilot reordering
themes.inclusion: Reorder, repeat order, usual, saved lists as default behavior

themes.name: Low browse intent
themes.inclusion: Rarely opens categories beyond search/reorder

themes.name: Unknown category value
themes.inclusion: Unsure why to try a new category

themes.name: Trust / quality risk
themes.inclusion: Fear of bad quality, freshness, authenticity in unfamiliar categories

themes.name: Price uncertainty
themes.inclusion: Unclear fees, surge, too expensive to try

themes.name: Relevance doubt
themes.inclusion: Not for me; category feels irrelevant
themes.exclusion: Explicit niche interest in that category

themes.name: Search-led discovery
themes.inclusion: Finds products mainly via search

themes.name: Homepage / banners
themes.inclusion: Discovers via home, banners, campaigns

themes.name: Recommendations
themes.inclusion: Personalized or suggested-for-you discovery

themes.name: Social proof
themes.inclusion: Ratings, reviews, influencer/friend mentions drive trial

themes.name: Word of mouth
themes.inclusion: Offline/online peer recommendation

themes.name: Ingredients / use-cases
themes.inclusion: Needs usage guidance before trying

themes.name: Sizing / freshness
themes.inclusion: Needs size, weight, expiry, freshness cues

themes.name: Return / refund policy
themes.inclusion: Needs clarity on returns before trying new category

themes.name: Review depth
themes.inclusion: Wants more/better reviews before trial

themes.name: Stockouts
themes.inclusion: Items unavailable / frequently OOS

themes.name: Late delivery
themes.inclusion: Missed ETA / slow delivery

themes.name: Poor substitutes
themes.inclusion: Bad replacements

themes.name: Opaque fees
themes.inclusion: Surprise charges, unclear delivery/surge fees

themes.name: Weak support
themes.inclusion: Hard to reach support / unresolved issues

themes.name: Deal-driven trial
themes.inclusion: Tries new categories because of discounts/offers

themes.name: Life-event triggers
themes.inclusion: Pet, baby, move, health change drives new category

themes.name: Gift / occasion buying
themes.inclusion: Festival/gift prompts exploration

themes.name: Niche interest
themes.inclusion: Specialty diet, hobby, brand fandom

themes.name: Missing assortment
themes.inclusion: Category/product gaps

themes.name: Weak guidance
themes.inclusion: No help choosing in unfamiliar categories
themes.exclusion: Expert users who do not need guidance

themes.name: No starter kits
themes.inclusion: Wants bundles/starter packs for new categories

themes.name: Weak cross-category cues
themes.inclusion: App does not suggest adjacent categories

notes: Seed themes from Phase 0 covered all seven theme families.
Residual clusters (if any) recorded as candidates; not merged into core v1 without analyst review.
Multi-label assignment allowed when keyword hits or definition similarity clears thresholds.
